steps.title: Find the singular antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun in the main clause refers to "a given industry," which is singular. The examples "water and electricity" are set off by dashes and do not control the pronoun or verb.

steps.title: Apply pronoun agreement
steps.content: Choice A uses the plural pronoun "these." Choice B uses the plural pronoun "they." Choice D uses "this," which is vague rather than a clear personal pronoun referring to the industry. The answer is C.
